name: DW · Fact Sales Order
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS sales_order_id,
    'SO-' || lpad(gs::text, 6, '0')                                            AS order_number,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOCUST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2000)::int    AS customer_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOEMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)::int      AS employee_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOSTORE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 50)::int     AS store_id,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('SODATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 1095)::int) AS order_date,
    (ARRAY['Web','Phone','In-Store','Partner'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOCHAN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)::int] AS order_channel,
    (ARRAY['Completed','Completed','Completed','Shipped','Cancelled','Returned'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)::int] AS status,
    (ARRAY['Credit Card','PayPal','Invoice','Wire'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SOPAY'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)::int]  AS payment_method
FROM generate_series(1, 5000) AS gs
